indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: There are no stoves, ovens, or refrigerators visible in the image, which are essential for cooking.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is crucial for food preparation and hygiene.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertops or hard washable work surfaces are visible, which are necessary for food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: absence of storage space
indicators.rationale: There is no visible storage space for ingredients or kitchenware.

indicators.name: absence of lighting control
indicators.rationale: There is no visible lighting control system, which is important for adjusting the lighting to suit different cooking tasks.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking activities. There are no cooking appliances, no water fixture, no hard prep surfaces, no storage space, and no lighting control, making it impossible to perform any cooking tasks.
